messages.text: BL-482 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-482" (or "reject BL-482 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Operator's self-narrated operator.log timestamps/freshness claims drift ~1h off real UTC: it sources 'now' from local (UTC+1) time labelled Z
What it solves: VERIFIED ROOT CAUSE (specifier, 2026-07-17 — checked against real code, not assumed):
  - The CODE clock is CORRECT UTC. operator_runtime.bb line 222-234: `now-iso` =
    `(.format ISO_INSTANT (java.time.Instant/now))` — a genuine UTC instant. Both the
    `log!` code path (line 234) and the heartb…
